/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang -Wall  -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libnp_helper.dylib -install_name @rpath/libnp_helper.dylib CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/transpose.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/pack_tril.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/npdot.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/condense.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/omp_reduce.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/np_helper.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/imatcopy.c.o CMakeFiles/np_helper.dir/np_broadcast.c.o   -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib  -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib64 -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
